claim: Automatic particle-region descriptors can rank near-pre-event ROIs for manual review.
evidence_summary: Fusion near-vs-any uses manual_qc_augmented_fusion_score with AUC 0.785, AP 0.616, source-stratified p 0.00399; mechanism falsification near-vs-any AUC 0.783, AP 0.654, p 0.0005; same-source nearest controls median delta 0.208, positive fraction 0.781, sign-flip p 0.0005.
blockers_or_limitations: Manual labels are pending; source-median test has only 5 eligible sources and p 0.057; top-k still has source concentration.
next_actions: Use the immediate-review dossier and blinded workbook to collect manual particle/front labels; rerun gates after labels are frozen.
allowed_wording: Near-pre-event particle crops show coupled optical-transport, rollout-difficulty, front/kinetic evidence useful for source-aware manual-review ranking.
forbidden_wording: Do not call this a causal degradation mechanism, a deployable detector, a calibrated velocity, or a diffusion coefficient.

claim: The project has a concrete prioritized review dossier for apparent transport/front/kinetic candidates.
evidence_summary: Dossier has 128 rows, 14 sources, 6 immediate-review rows, 0 diffusion-claim candidates; top candidate source_balanced_cycle152_rank29_obj1_17_c2_x10_HighHighCOV_150723 score 0.892. Blinded workbook has 40 rows across 12 hidden-key sources.
blockers_or_limitations: No manual decisions have been imported yet; hidden key must remain unused until review is frozen.
next_actions: Have reviewers complete blinded workbook fields, then join labels back through the hidden key and recompute strict gates.
allowed_wording: A blinded, source-balanced manual-QC handoff exists for top transport/front/kinetic candidates.
forbidden_wording: Do not treat the dossier scores as manual labels or accepted fronts.

claim: Apparent transport/front descriptors generalize as a broad future-drop predictor across expanded ROI crops.
evidence_summary: Expanded cohort processed 96/96 rows across 14 sources. Best future8 feature abs_radial_flow_mean AUC 0.727, AP 0.645, source-stratified p 0.078. Best future16 feature gradient_aligned_flow_slope AUC 0.666, p 0.138; source-residual divergence_q90 AUC 0.642, p 0.034.
blockers_or_limitations: Future8 raw radial-flow rows are suggestive but not strict source-invariant; composite expansion score is weak and can rank high-scoring future-negative controls.
next_actions: Treat expansion rows as candidate generation and negative controls; build event-window-specific models rather than one broad predictor.
allowed_wording: Expanded-cohort transport/front features show modest, source-sensitive future-label associations and useful controls.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim a general source-robust degradation-warning model from transport/front descriptors alone.

claim: Next-frame prediction and rollout residuals are useful particle-region physics descriptors.
evidence_summary: Best median particle baseline is persistence with median MSE 0.00149; no non-persistence method wins by median. Top event-relative rollout signal persistence_particle_mse has AUC 0.662, AP 0.619, MW p 0.0134.
blockers_or_limitations: Learned/trend baselines do not beat persistence robustly; rollout residuals indicate instability/difficulty rather than accurate long-horizon prediction.
next_actions: Use persistence-normalized particle residuals as interpretable features in source-aware review models; avoid claiming predictive superiority.
allowed_wording: Particle-region rollout difficulty is a useful instability descriptor near events.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim the current rollout models outperform persistence or forecast full video evolution reliably.

claim: The current pipeline can report calibrated material diffusion coefficients.
evidence_summary: Diffusion readiness status is not_ready_for_calibrated_diffusion_claim; publication-ready candidates 0; hard blockers 8: HDF5 spatial calibration metadata present, Per-ROI HDF5 timing stability, Radius2 linear-fit quality, q70 positive confidence interval, Automatic/publication diffusion candidates, Manual QC accepted labels, Control-balanced diffusion sanity candidates, Event/control diffusion separability.
blockers_or_limitations: Missing/insufficient spatial calibration metadata, timing stability, front fit quality, positive CI, control-balanced sanity, event/control separability, and accepted manual QC.
next_actions: After manual QC and calibration provenance, recompute front slopes and diffusion gates only on accepted fronts.
allowed_wording: Only apparent optical-front diffusion proxies are available, and calibrated diffusion is not ready.
forbidden_wording: Do not report Li diffusion coefficients, calibrated material diffusivity, or publication-ready diffusion candidates.

claim: The videos support automatic phase-boundary/front tracking as a physical proxy.
evidence_summary: Front/kinetic fusion near-vs-post/control AUC 0.798, AP 0.755, source-stratified p 0.0259; mechanism top candidate has front-direction gate True and diffusion blocked True.
blockers_or_limitations: Automatic front/radius proxies are sensitive to masks, thresholds, drift, and missing manual accept labels.
next_actions: Use visual packet and blinded manual labels to decide which fronts are interpretable; then rerun strict front gates.
allowed_wording: Automatic front/kinetic proxies can prioritize candidate phase-boundary-like motion for review.
forbidden_wording: Do not describe these as validated physical phase-boundary velocities before manual QC and calibration.

claim: The current automatic video/echem features form a deployable future degradation warning detector.
evidence_summary: Residualized future8 decision is video=not_supported_after_controls and fused=not_incremental_over_echem_context; acquisition context AUC 1; fused minus echem residualized source-cohort delta AUC -0.0988.
blockers_or_limitations: Acquisition/source context dominates weak future labels; optical/echem fusion is not incremental over echem context under strict source-cohort controls.
next_actions: Keep models as review-prioritization aids; collect manual labels and design prospective/source-heldout validation before any deployment claim.
allowed_wording: Current warning models expose context and review-prioritization signals.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim deployable warning, prospective prediction, or source-transferable degradation detection.
